injuries.comment: Lundkvist has not recovered from his illness and did not play against the Panthers on Saturday (Dec. 13)
The Stars said on Monday (Dec. 8) that Lyubushkin won't accompany the team on its upcoming two-game road trip, according to Sam Nestler of DLLS Stars.
Byfield has been ruled out for Monday's (Dec. 15) game against the Stars due to an illness, as per David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period reports.
Danault will not be in the lineup versus Dallas on Monday (Dec. 15), as per David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period reports.
